Back to Shop
Toys

Duck Toy

(124 reviews)

Turn bath time, playtime, or anytime into a splash of fun with this Duck Toy! Specially designed for curious canines and playful puppies, this cheerful yellow duck is made from durable, pet-safe rubber that’s built to withstand even the most enthusiastic chewers.

$25.00
In Stock
Add to Cart

Product Details

More details about the product

Our Duck Toy is crafted from high-quality, non-toxic rubber, making it safe and fun for your pup. Its squeaky feature and floating ability offer versatile entertainment indoors and outdoors.

  • Material: Durable rubber
  • Size: 6" x 3" x 3"
  • Recommended for: Small to medium-sized dogs

Jane D.

“My puppy is obsessed with this duck. It’s been two weeks and still going strong!”

Mike R.

“Good quality. Squeaker is loud, which my dog loves but not my ears 😄”

We offer fast and reliable shipping across the country. Orders are processed within 1–2 business days.

  • Standard Shipping: 3–5 business days
  • Express Shipping: 1–2 business days
  • Easy Returns: 30-day money-back guarantee
